overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a desert highway gas station and continuing along the open road. The scene transitions from a neon-lit covered station area with futuristic vending machines to an expansive desert highway with distant mountains under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic gas station under neon-lit canopy

events.description: exits the covered gas station canopy into open sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the gas station interior between concrete pillars and exiting toward the highway

notable_agents.action: standing near the gas station pillars facing the vending machines

entered.detail: futuristic angular metal canopy with cyan neon strip lighting underneath
thick dark concrete pillars supporting the station roof structure
bright cyan fluorescent tube lighting running along the canopy edges
red automated kiosk with large advertisement poster featuring a person holding a glass
tall vertical digital sign displaying fuel prices with blue illuminated panels

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under the covered gas station canopy with cyan neon lighting and concrete pillars. The character walks forward past a vending machine and exits into the bright sunlight, transitioning from the sheltered station area to the open highway edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway service area with vending machines and parked vehicles

events.description: passes the parked sedan and continues along the highway shoulder

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the vending machines and a parked car toward the open desert highway

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: dark colored four-door sedan parked near the vending machines
large metal highway sign structure spanning across the road ahead
metal safety barrier running along the left edge of the highway
dry bushes and sparse vegetation covering the desert ground
tall advertising billboard with colorful graphics visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the highway service area, the scene features a parked sedan and futuristic vending machines on the right, with a metal guardrail on the left. The camera passes these structures as the desert landscape opens up, revealing a highway gantry and billboard in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with sparse scrub and distant mountains

events.description: passing under the highway overhead sign gantry

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder through the open desert landscape approaching and passing the overhead sign structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows an expansive desert highway stretching toward distant mountains under a clear blue sky. The camera approaches and passes under the large overhead highway gantry, with dry scrub vegetation lining the roadside and a colorful billboard standing prominently on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered, neon-lit interior of a gas station out into a vast, sun-drenched desert landscape. It begins under a covered canopy illuminated by cyan neon lights, moving past concrete pillars and a vending machine before stepping out into the bright sunlight. As the camera proceeds along the highway service area, it passes a parked sedan and further futuristic vending machines, with the environment opening up to reveal a metal guardrail and a distant highway gantry. The scene then expands into an expansive desert vista under a clear blue sky, moving past dry scrub vegetation and a colorful billboard. Finally, the camera glides under the large overhead gantry as the road stretches forward toward distant mountains.
